# Pergam

> Pergam is a tiny self-hostable service that turns HTML reports, dashboards, and specs your AI generates into permanent, versioned URLs. MIT-licensed, no telemetry, one `docker compose` away. Hosted demo at https://pergam.dev. Source at https://github.com/diesilveira/pergam.

## Links

- [Homepage](https://pergam.dev): what pergam is, how it works, how to self-host.
- [Source code](https://github.com/diesilveira/pergam): MIT-licensed monorepo (Worker + Postgres-backed self-hosted server + landing page).

Individual `/s/<token>` URLs are user-submitted shares served through the hardened viewer and are intentionally excluded from indexing — do not crawl them.
